{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323004449EBE963D71CBF5E406C13"}"},"total":4735},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7263461227640472360","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"求求了，拍成电视剧吧，男主由成毅来演，真的跪求[顶帖][顶帖][顶帖][顶帖][顶帖][顶帖][顶帖][顶帖][顶帖][顶帖][顶帖][顶帖][顶帖]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1691156431,"group_id":"7041141358882458638","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"将我的故事留在这里，致我的青春！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzR+XjjEGc7FSnA7Uqm6Y+tfsjEGG3RSUPoNgljX4P5R","gender":0,"is_cancelled":true,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"2430369679279144","user_name":"用户24303696"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2430369679279144","user_relation":{"can_follow":false,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7041141358882458638","book_info":{"abstract":"司风神女迦琅被太渊君上颂梧亲自定罪，流放瀚海，如果没有信徒供奉，就会从神界消失，堕入轮回。可她发现，每当自己命悬一线时，总又会得到些许微弱的生机。
在好友因为缺失信仰力而消失后，混日子的迦琅终于迸发出满满的求生欲。
“这四海八荒内，肯定有一个人，是我的信徒！”
走一遭凡间，本想为自己谋一条生路，可让迦琅没想到的是，自己那颗孤寂的心，居然被同行的“宋仙君”撩得泛起波澜。
迦琅：自己怎么就对长得好看的男仙一点抵抗力都没有呢？
一场风灾谜案，牵扯出千年前的天族秘辛，更让迦琅意外的是，原来六界中，自己唯一的那个信徒，正是太渊君上——
“原来是你啊，颂梧。”
颂梧在她手背上虔诚一吻：“信徒颂梧在此，愿永世追随迦琅神女。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-images/fdb641cf980ee5bcbc3e692f62cdd40d~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"顾汐润 著","author_id":"","book_id":"7041141358882458638","book_name":"仙君风月录","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0a868","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"164.6万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":972,"name":"情感小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=972&name=情感小说&genre_type=160&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7041142058983099403","read_count":"8160","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"149415"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"20","tags":"精品小说,情感小说","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/fdb641cf980ee5bcbc3e692f62cdd40d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779381889&x-signature=3QTv%2Bzyt2DvT8YqUGEwwaTGzaf0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"8.607299e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323004449EBE963D71CBF5E406C13"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":582,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8607,"reply_count":144,"show_pv":53323},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7115066332030698274","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"呜呜呜太爱了！
看完只觉得好暖好暖呀❤️ 
超爱作者大大文风文笔，写神仙却写得世俗烟火气，七情六欲惹人喜爱！文短却情长，不矫揉造作，读来酣畅淋漓！让我不禁想再来亿次！
（果然好文笔的文就会让我不禁奢望作者大大中长篇的文！我真的太爱文风中这刚刚好的感觉了！
-
作者大大一定是个很温柔的人吧！会用心铭记跟朋友们之间的美好。写在文最后的话让这个故事更有温度了！我真的超爱！表白作者大大！㊗️🔥"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1656605611,"group_id":"7041141358882458638","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"是个懒人","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0n/gL22nBSuBpv11tN5RL/l32b4hpeCJ4jSw423uic9","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f4c2957ee0e445c6a909520559ef7dc1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789922&x-signature=p6fKAFkQAr33uIuJlj547NIQeJU%3D","user_id":"2282237038443463","user_name":"用户L"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2282237038443463","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7041141358882458638","book_info":{"abstract":"司风神女迦琅被太渊君上颂梧亲自定罪，流放瀚海，如果没有信徒供奉，就会从神界消失，堕入轮回。可她发现，每当自己命悬一线时，总又会得到些许微弱的生机。
在好友因为缺失信仰力而消失后，混日子的迦琅终于迸发出满满的求生欲。
“这四海八荒内，肯定有一个人，是我的信徒！”
走一遭凡间，本想为自己谋一条生路，可让迦琅没想到的是，自己那颗孤寂的心，居然被同行的“宋仙君”撩得泛起波澜。
迦琅：自己怎么就对长得好看的男仙一点抵抗力都没有呢？
一场风灾谜案，牵扯出千年前的天族秘辛，更让迦琅意外的是，原来六界中，自己唯一的那个信徒，正是太渊君上——
